info.title: Barmada API
info.description: Barmada staff API: run the bar from a phone. Token auth via Sanctum; tenancy and authorization mirror the web app.

post.description:
TableSessionRequest carries no tenant column, so tenancy is enforced
by resolving its session and table THROUGH EditorScope before
authorizing — cross-tenant requests 404. First-guest requests
(no session yet) are adopted via POST /tables/{table}/approve.
post.summary: Approves an additional guest on an open table's session

patch.summary: Rename a category (unique within its tenant)

post.summary:
Move one step in the manual ordering: {"direction": "up"|"down"}.
Edges are no-ops

delete.summary:
Deletes an establishment and ALL its data (FK-ordered transaction,
including client invoices and staff accounts). Requires an explicit
{"confirm": true} — there is no undo

message.const: Establishment and all related data deleted.
Confirmation required: pass "confirm": true to delete this establishment and all of its data.

get.summary:
Order list with optional filters. Implicit tenancy via EditorScope;
admins see all tenants

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

post.summary:
Manual order entry (staff/editor/admin) — the API twin of the web
order form, through the same CreateOrder action as the guest flow

patch.summary:
Status transitions: deliver, un-deliver, cancel — with the board's
rules (cancelled is final, cancel from pending only)

post.summary:
The payment-ticking endpoint: toggles one item's paid state (tap as
guests pay cash), auto-delivering the order when fully paid

get.summary:
The catalog as live service needs it: names, prices, categories and
availability. Bounded by EditorScope. Full catalog management (CRUD,
photos, category ordering) arrives in the next PR of the series

post.description:
⚠️ Cannot generate request documentation: Cannot evaluate validation rules (1 evaluators failed):
  [NodeRulesEvaluator] Cannot access private constant App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\ProductController::RULES (at /agent/workspace/barmada/vendor/dedoc/scramble/src/Support/OperationExtensions/RulesEvaluator/ConstFetchEvaluator.php:42)
post.summary:
Create a catalog product. Multipart: optional "photo" (raster
image) and "icon" (script-free SVG when icon_type=svg) uploads —
stored under random names with forced safe extensions, exactly
like the web form

One-tap 86: hide a product from the guest menu (and reject it
server-side at order time) or bring it back

post.description:
⚠️ Cannot generate request documentation: Cannot evaluate validation rules (1 evaluators failed):
  [NodeRulesEvaluator] Cannot access private constant App\Http\Controllers\Api\V1\ProductController::RULES (at /agent/workspace/barmada/vendor/dedoc/scramble/src/Support/OperationExtensions/RulesEvaluator/ConstFetchEvaluator.php:42)
post.summary:
Update a product. POST (not PATCH) so multipart uploads work from
mobile HTTP clients

get.summary:
The table grid: active tables (and archived, on request), bounded
by EditorScope

The table's current session as the staff app's payment screen needs
it: countable orders with per-item paid state, totals, the captured
invoice details, and open service requests

post.summary:
Explicit close [F-11]. Pass {"settle": true} to mark the remaining
balance paid and close in one step (the web's "pay & close")

Approves a pending table and adopts the waiting devices — the
first-guest flow [F-1]

Client tax-invoice capture for the current session — printed on
the bill. [#6]

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
